Established on 3rd February 2017, Ruling and Reigning Church of Christ exists to keep unveiling Jesus Christ and living in His fullness.

“For in Him dwelleth all the fulness of the Godhead bodily. And ye are complete in Him.”

Colossians 2:9–10, NKJV
The Vision

To Unveil Christ, And Live In His Fullness

Since the 3rd of February 2017, Ruling and Reigning Church of Christ has carried one divine mandate — to unveil the person of Christ and to raise a people who live, walk and reign in His fullness. Every altar call, every service, every encounter is built to draw us deeper into who He is.

Pst Emmanuel Nkwocha — Senior Pastor, RRCC
Service Times

Come Encounter Him With Us

Join us midweek and on Sundays as we minister in the Holyghost and walk in the prophetic.

Wednesday

Holyghost Service

3:00 PM

A midweek altar of refreshing — ministry in the Holyghost to reset the soul before the week ends.

Sunday · 1st Service

Holyghost & Prophetic Service

8:00 AM

Our first gathering of the day — the Word, worship and the prophetic flowing from the start.

Sunday · 2nd Service

Holyghost & Prophetic Service

10:45 AM

A continuation of the encounter — for families and friends joining us later in the morning.
